source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E36 Sleeping Princess［睡公主］

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E36 Sleeping Princess［睡公主］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 giu3 zou6
cards.english: My name is Peppa.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E36 Sleeping Princess［睡公主］
cards.jyutping: ji4 keoi5 zau6 hai6 ngo5 sai3 lou2
cards.english: And this is my little brother George.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E36 Sleeping Princess［睡公主］
cards.jyutping: keoi5 zau6 hai6 zyu1 taai3 taai2
cards.english: This is Mrs. Pig.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E36 Sleeping Princess［睡公主］
cards.jyutping: keoi5 hai6 zyu1 sin1 saang1
cards.english: This is Mr. Pig.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E36 Sleeping Princess［睡公主］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 hai6
cards.english: I'm Peppa.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E36 Sleeping Princess［睡公主］
cards.jyutping: seoi6 gung1 zyu2
cards.english: [Sleeping Beauty]

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E36 Sleeping Princess［睡公主］
cards.characters: 到咗夜晚，Peppa同George要上牀瞓覺喇
cards.jyutping: dou3 zo2 je6 maan5 tung4 jiu3 soeng5 cong4 fan3 gaau3 laa3
cards.english: It's nighttime, Peppa and George have to go to bed.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E36 Sleeping Princess［睡公主］
cards.jyutping: zou2 tau2 laa3
cards.english: Good night, Peppa and George.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E36 Sleeping Princess［睡公主］
cards.jyutping: maa1 mi4 de1 dei6
cards.english: Mommy, Daddy.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E36 Sleeping Princess［睡公主］
cards.jyutping: me1 si6 aa3
cards.english: What is it, Peppa?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E36 Sleeping Princess［睡公主］
cards.characters: 我仲未眼瞓喇，講故仔我聽得嗎？
cards.jyutping: ngo5 zung6 mei6 ngaan5 fan3 laa3 gong2 gu2 zai2 ngo5 ting1 dak1 maa1
cards.english: I'm not sleepy yet, can you tell me a story?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E36 Sleeping Princess［睡公主］
cards.characters: 可能George已經眼瞓，唔想聽故仔喎
cards.jyutping: ho2 nang4 ji5 ging1 ngaan5 fan3 m4 soeng2 ting1 gu2 zai2 wo3
cards.english: Maybe George is already sleepy and doesn't want to hear a story.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E36 Sleeping Princess［睡公主］
cards.jyutping: nei5 soeng2 ting1 gu2 zai2 maa1
cards.english: George, do you want to hear a story?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E36 Sleeping Princess［睡公主］
cards.jyutping: nei5 waa6 soeng2 laa1
cards.english: Say "yes".

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E36 Sleeping Princess［睡公主］
cards.jyutping: hai6 gam2 hou2 laa1
cards.english: Okay then.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E36 Sleeping Princess［睡公主］
cards.characters: 但係我今晚只會講一個故仔㗎咋
cards.jyutping: daan6 hai6 ngo5 gam1 maan5 zi2 wui5 gong2 jat1 go3 gu2 zai2 ga3 zaa3
cards.english: But I'm only telling one story tonight.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E36 Sleeping Princess［睡公主］
cards.characters: 係噉，你哋兩個要應承我
cards.jyutping: hai6 gam2 nei5 dei6 loeng5 go3 jiu3 jing1 sing4 ngo5
cards.english: In that case, you two need to promise me something.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E36 Sleeping Princess［睡公主］
cards.characters: 爹哋講完故仔之後，就會即刻瞓
cards.jyutping: de1 dei6 gong2 jyun4 gu2 zai2 zi1 hau6 zau6 wui6 zik1 hak1 fan3
cards.english: After Daddy tells the story, you'll go to sleep immediately.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E36 Sleeping Princess［睡公主］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 jing1 sing4 nei5
cards.english: I promise

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E36 Sleeping Princess［睡公主］
cards.characters: 係噉，我就講呢個故仔啦
cards.jyutping: hai6 gam2 ngo5 zau6 gong2 ni1 go3 gu2 zai2 laa1
cards.english: Okay, so I'll tell this story now.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E36 Sleeping Princess［睡公主］
cards.jyutping: go3 gu2 zai2 giu3 seoi6 gung1 zyu2
cards.english: The story is called Sleeping Beauty.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E36 Sleeping Princess［睡公主］
cards.jyutping: ni1 go3 gu2 zai2 hou2 m4 hou2 ting1 gaa4
cards.english: Is this story good?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E36 Sleeping Princess［睡公主］
cards.characters: 個名聽落好似好悶噉喎
cards.jyutping: go3 ming4 ting1 lok6 hou2 ci5 hou2 mun6 gam2 wo3
cards.english: The name sounds boring.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E36 Sleeping Princess［睡公主］
cards.characters: 一啲都唔悶，仲好好聽㗎
cards.jyutping: jat1 di1 dou1 m4 mun6 zung6 hou2 hou2 ting1 gaa4
cards.english: It's not boring at all, it's very good.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E36 Sleeping Princess［睡公主］
cards.characters: 故仔入面係咪真係有公主㗎？
cards.jyutping: gu2 zai2 jap6 min6 hai6 mai6 zan1 hai6 jau5 gung1 zyu2 gaa4
cards.english: Is there really a princess in the story?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E36 Sleeping Princess［睡公主］
cards.characters: Peppa，如果你再講嘢嘅 爹哋就講唔到故仔㗎喇
cards.jyutping: jyu4 gwo2 nei5 zoi3 gong2 je5 ge3 de1 dei6 zau6 gong2 m4 dou3 gu2 zai2 gaa4 laa3
cards.english: Peppa, if you keep talking, Daddy won't be able to tell the story.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E36 Sleeping Princess［睡公主］
cards.jyutping: deoi3 m4 zyu6 aa3
cards.english: Sorry.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E36 Sleeping Princess［睡公主］
cards.characters: 噉個故仔入面係咪真係有公主㗎？
cards.jyutping: gam2 go3 gu2 zai2 jap6 min6 hai6 mai6 zan1 hai6 jau5 gung1 zyu2 gaa4
cards.english: So is there really a princess in the story?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E36 Sleeping Princess［睡公主］
cards.characters: 係啊，個故仔入面係有公主㗎
cards.jyutping: hai6 aa3 go3 gu2 zai2 jap6 min6 hai6 jau5 gung1 zyu2 gaa4
cards.english: Yes, there is a princess in the story.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E36 Sleeping Princess［睡公主］
cards.jyutping: ni1 go3 gu2 zai2 giu3 seoi6 gung1 zyu2
cards.english: This story is called Sleeping Beauty.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E36 Sleeping Princess［睡公主］
cards.jyutping: hou2 noi6 hou2 noi6 zi1 cin4
cards.english: A long, long time ago,

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E36 Sleeping Princess［睡公主］
cards.characters: 喺城堡入面有一個小公主
cards.jyutping: hai2 sing4 bou2 jap6 min6 jau5 jat1 go3 siu2 gung1 zyu2
cards.english: In a castle, there was a little princess.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E36 Sleeping Princess［睡公主］
cards.jyutping: keoi5 zau6 giu3 seoi6 gung1 zyu2
cards.english: She was called Sleeping Beauty.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E36 Sleeping Princess［睡公主］
cards.jyutping: de1 dei6 dim2 gaai2 gam2 joeng2 giu3 keoi5 ge2
cards.english: Daddy, why is she called that?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E36 Sleeping Princess［睡公主］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 jat1 zan6 zau6 gong2 dou3 gaa4 laa3
cards.english: I'll get to that in a moment.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E36 Sleeping Princess［睡公主］
cards.characters: 係噉睡公主佢靚唔靚㗎？
cards.jyutping: hai6 gam2 seoi6 gung1 zyu2 keoi5 leng3 m4 leng3 gaa4
cards.english: So, is Sleeping Beauty pretty?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E36 Sleeping Princess［睡公主］
cards.jyutping: leng3 gaa4 keoi5 fei1 soeng4 zi1 leng3
cards.english: Yes, she is very pretty.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E36 Sleeping Princess［睡公主］
cards.characters: 佢最鍾意就係照鏡㗎喇
cards.jyutping: keoi5 zeoi3 zung1 ji3 zau6 hai6 ziu3 geng3 gaa4 laa3
cards.english: She loves looking in the mirror the most.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E36 Sleeping Princess［睡公主］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 zan1 hai6 taai3 leng3 laa3
cards.english: I'm so beautiful!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E36 Sleeping Princess［睡公主］
cards.characters: 城堡入面有啲咩人住㗎？
cards.jyutping: sing4 bou2 jap6 min6 jau5 di1 me1 jan4 zyu6 gaa4
cards.english: Who lives in the castle?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E36 Sleeping Princess［睡公主］
cards.jyutping: aai2 ne1 cang4
cards.english: Um... this...

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E36 Sleeping Princess［睡公主］
cards.characters: 城堡入便仲住咗一位小王子
cards.jyutping: sing4 bou2 jap6 bin6 zung6 zyu6 zo2 jat1 wai6 siu2 wong4 zi2
cards.english: There also lives a little prince in the castle.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E36 Sleeping Princess［睡公主］
cards.characters: 皇后太太，仲有國王先生
cards.jyutping: wong4 hau6 taai3 taai2 zung6 jau5 gwok3 wong4 sin1 saang1
cards.english: Queen, and also the King.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E36 Sleeping Princess［睡公主］
cards.characters: 係啊，城堡入面有咁多人㗎
cards.jyutping: hai6 aa3 sing4 bou2 jap6 min6 jau5 gam3 do1 jan4 gaa4
cards.english: Yes, there are so many people in the castle.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E36 Sleeping Princess［睡公主］
cards.characters: 噉國王先生有冇大肚腩㗎？
cards.jyutping: gam2 gwok3 wong4 sin1 saang1 jau5 mou5 daai6 tou5 naam5 gaa4
cards.english: So, does the King have a big belly?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E36 Sleeping Princess［睡公主］
cards.characters: 當然冇啦，佢仲非常英俊𠻹
cards.jyutping: dong1 jin4 mou5 laa1 keoi5 zung6 fei1 soeng4 jing1 zeon3 tim1
cards.english: Of course not, he is very handsome.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E36 Sleeping Princess［睡公主］
cards.jyutping: hou2 ci5 ngo5 gam2
cards.english: Like me.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E36 Sleeping Princess［睡公主］
cards.characters: 總之，故仔入面仲有一條龍
cards.jyutping: zung2 zi1 gu2 zai2 jap6 min6 zung6 jau5 jat1 tiu4 lung4
cards.english: Anyway, there is also a dragon in the story.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E36 Sleeping Princess［睡公主］
cards.jyutping: hung2 lung4
cards.english: A dinosaur!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E36 Sleeping Princess［睡公主］
cards.jyutping: hung2 lung4
cards.english: A dinosaur?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E36 Sleeping Princess［睡公主］
cards.jyutping: juk1 hai6 aa3
cards.english: Oh, right.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E36 Sleeping Princess［睡公主］
cards.characters: 佢唔係一條龍，而係隻恐龍至啱啊
cards.jyutping: keoi5 m4 hai6 jat1 tiu4 lung4 ji4 hai6 zek3 hung2 lung4 zi3 ngaam1 aa3
cards.english: It's not a dragon, but a dinosaur.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E36 Sleeping Princess［睡公主］
cards.jyutping: hai2 sing4 bou2 ngoi6 min6 zyu6 zo2
cards.english: It lived outside the castle,

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E36 Sleeping Princess［睡公主］
cards.characters: 一隻好巨大又好兇猛嘅恐龍
cards.jyutping: jat1 zek3 hou2 geoi6 daai6 jau6 hou2 hung1 maang5 ge3 hung2 lung4
cards.english: a very huge and ferocious dinosaur.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E36 Sleeping Princess［睡公主］
cards.jyutping: juk1 bai6 laa3 de1 dei6 aa1
cards.english: Oh dear, Daddy.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E36 Sleeping Princess［睡公主］
cards.characters: 其實隻恐龍可能唔係咁兇猛㗎咋
cards.jyutping: kei4 sat6 zek3 hung2 lung4 ho2 nang4 m4 hai6 gam3 hung1 maang5 ga3 zaa3
cards.english: Actually, the dinosaur might not be that ferocious.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E36 Sleeping Princess［睡公主］
cards.jyutping: deoi3 m4 zyu6 aa3
cards.english: I'm sorry, George.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E36 Sleeping Princess［睡公主］
cards.characters: 係啊，隻恐龍其實非常善良
cards.jyutping: hai6 aa3 zek3 hung2 lung4 kei4 sat6 fei1 soeng4 sin6 loeng4
cards.english: Yes, the dinosaur is actually very kind.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E36 Sleeping Princess［睡公主］
cards.jyutping: keoi5 wui6 sik6 hou2 do1 cou2
cards.english: It eats a lot of grass.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E36 Sleeping Princess［睡公主］
cards.jyutping: de1 dei6 aa3
cards.english: Daddy!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E36 Sleeping Princess［睡公主］
cards.characters: 噢，對唔住啊，我只係扮緊恐龍啫
cards.jyutping: juk1 deoi3 m4 zyu6 aa3 ngo5 zi2 hai6 baan6 gan2 hung2 lung4 ze1
cards.english: Oh, I'm sorry. I'm just pretending to be a dinosaur.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E36 Sleeping Princess［睡公主］
cards.characters: 爹哋，係噉嗰位公主 點解要叫做睡公主𠸏？
cards.jyutping: de1 dei6 hai6 gam2 go2 wai6 gung1 zyu2 dim2 gaai2 jiu3 giu3 zou6 seoi6 gung1 zyu2 ge2
cards.english: Daddy, then why is the princess called Sleeping Beauty?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E36 Sleeping Princess［睡公主］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 zau6 faai3 gong2 dou3 laa3
cards.english: I'm just about to tell you.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E36 Sleeping Princess［睡公主］
cards.characters: 好喇，太陽落咗山，月亮同星星出嚟喇
cards.jyutping: hou2 laa3 taai3 joeng4 lok6 zo2 saan1 jyut6 loeng6 tung4 sing1 sing1 ceot1 lei4 laa3
cards.english: Okay, the sun has set, and the moon and stars have come out.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E36 Sleeping Princess［睡公主］
cards.jyutping: daai6 gaa1 dou1 gok3 dak1 hou2 ngaan5 fan3
cards.english: Everyone feels sleepy.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E36 Sleeping Princess［睡公主］
cards.characters: 但係最眼瞓嗰個，就係睡公主喇
cards.jyutping: daan6 hai6 zeoi3 ngaan5 fan3 go2 go3 zau6 hai6 seoi6 gung1 zyu2 laa3
cards.english: But the sleepiest of all is Sleeping Beauty.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E36 Sleeping Princess［睡公主］
cards.jyutping: nei5 hai6 mai6 hou2 ngaan5 fan3 ne1
cards.english: Peppa, are you sleepy?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E36 Sleeping Princess［睡公主］
cards.characters: 唔係啊，爹哋，我一啲都唔覺得眼瞓啊
cards.jyutping: m4 hai6 aa3 de1 dei6 ngo5 jat1 di1 dou1 m4 gok3 dak1 ngaan5 fan3 aa3
cards.english: No, Daddy, I don't feel sleepy at all.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E36 Sleeping Princess［睡公主］
cards.jyutping: daan6 hai6 jau5 jan4 m4 hai6 wo3
cards.english: But someone does.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E36 Sleeping Princess［睡公主］
cards.jyutping: hei2 san1 aa3
cards.english: George, wake up.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E36 Sleeping Princess［睡公主］
cards.characters: 你瞓着就聽唔到結局㗎喇
cards.jyutping: nei5 fan3 zoek6 zau6 ting1 m4 dou3 git3 guk6 gaa4 laa3
cards.english: If you fall asleep, you won't hear the ending.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E36 Sleeping Princess［睡公主］
cards.jyutping: hou2 laa1 ho2 nang4 m4 ngaan5 fan3
cards.english: Okay, maybe Peppa isn't sleepy.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E36 Sleeping Princess［睡公主］
cards.characters: 但係睡公主就覺得非常眼瞓
cards.jyutping: daan6 hai6 seoi6 gung1 zyu2 zau6 gok3 dak1 fei1 soeng4 ngaan5 fan3
cards.english: But Sleeping Beauty feels very sleepy.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E36 Sleeping Princess［睡公主］
cards.characters: 一日到黑係噉照鏡，令佢覺得好眼瞓
cards.jyutping: jat1 jat6 dou3 hak1 hai6 gam2 ziu3 geng3 ling6 keoi5 gok3 dak1 hou2 ngaan5 fan3
cards.english: Looking in the mirror all day makes her feel very sleepy.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E36 Sleeping Princess［睡公主］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 daai3 nei5 soeng5 cong4 fan3 gaau3 laa1
cards.english: I'll take you to bed.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E36 Sleeping Princess［睡公主］
cards.jyutping: zou2 tau2 laa3
cards.english: Good night.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E36 Sleeping Princess［睡公主］
cards.jyutping: seoi6 gung1 zyu2 gok3 dak1 fei1 soeng4 ngaan5 fan3
cards.english: Sleeping Beauty feels very sleepy.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E36 Sleeping Princess［睡公主］
cards.jyutping: so2 ji5 hou2 faai3 zau6 fan3 zoek6 zo2 laa3
cards.english: So she quickly fell asleep.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E36 Sleeping Princess［睡公主］
cards.characters: 多謝你個故仔啊，國王先生
cards.jyutping: do1 ze6 nei5 go3 gu2 zai2 aa3 gwok3 wong4 sin1 saang1
cards.english: Thank you for the story, Mr. King.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E36 Sleeping Princess［睡公主］
cards.jyutping: m4 sai2 haak3 hei3 wo3 wong4 hau6 taai3 taai2
cards.english: You're welcome, Queen.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E36 Sleeping Princess［睡公主］
cards.characters: 我哋嘅小王子同小公主都好鍾意啊
cards.jyutping: ngo5 dei6 ge3 siu2 wong4 zi2 tung4 siu2 gung1 zyu2 dou1 hou2 zung1 ji3 aa3
cards.english: Our little prince and little princess both enjoyed it very much.

defs: 1. obey; (adverb) 1. since…then; 2. because of (something), then…; 3. soon; (adverb) exactly;
allow something be a certain way
(after a suppositional clause) in that case; then
(after a clause of action) as soon as; immediately after
(same as 就是[jiu4 shi4]) merely; nothing else but; simply; just; precisely; exactly
as much as; as many as
(often followed by 著|着[zhe5]) taking advantage of
(bound form) to reach; to attain (as in 一蹴而就[yi1 cu4 er2 jiu4])
(pattern: 就[jiu4] ... 也[ye3] ...) even if ... still ...
(pattern: 不[bu4] ... 就[jiu4] ...) if not ... then must be ...
used in courteous phrases expressing causing trouble
(bound form) having; with; -ful; -ed; -al (as in 有意[you3 yi4] intentional)
female version of 小皇帝[xiao3 huang2 di4]
classifier for birds and certain animals, one of a pair, some utensils, vessels etc
classifier for birds and certain animals, one of a pair, some utensils, vessels etc
why; how to explain; how come;
(coll.) a star; the stars in the sky
sentence-final particle, contraction of 了啊, indicating exclamation
particle placed after each item in a list of examples
sentence-final particle, contraction of 了啊, indicating exclamation
particle placed after each item in a list of examples
adverb) little; a few; some; slightly; somewhat
still (usually used in the context of ‘still not’ or to describe the remaining time left till something)
most suitable; most appropriate; the right way
outside (also pr. [wai4 mian5] for this sense)
as far as sth is concerned
head of a gang or mafia (Cantonese)
(noun of sibling) younger brother; slang for penis
